zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Deol Burton於1457年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可福可納時，他的父親Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor38歲，母親Christian Stapleton35歲。他和Joyce Griffin至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1524年4月23日在英國史洛普爾馬可特 德雷頓享年67歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Deol Burton于1457年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特可福可納时，他的父亲Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor38岁，母亲Christian Stapleton35岁。他和Joyce Griffin至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1524年4月23日在英国史洛普爾馬可特 德雷頓享年67岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Burton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a placename that is very common in central and northern England. The derivation in most cases is from Old English burh ‘fort’ (see Burke ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Deol Burton was born in 1457, in Crewkerne, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor, was 38 and his mother, Christian Stapleton, was 35. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Joyce Griffin. He died on 23 April 1524, in Market Drayton, Shropshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Deol Burton est né en 1457, à Crewkerne, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Christian Stapleton, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Joyce Griffin. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1524, à Market Drayton, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Deol Burton 1457 in Crewkerne, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor 38 und seine Mutter Christian Stapleton 35. Er hatte mit Joyce Griffin mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. April 1524 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Market Drayton, Shropshire, England und wurde in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Deol Burton è nato il nel 1457 nel Crewkerne, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Christian Stapleton, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Joyce Griffin. Morì il 23 aprile 1524, nel Market Drayton, Shropshire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Deol Burtonが1457年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトクレウケルンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnorは38歳，母Christian Stapletonは35歳であった。彼はJoyce Griffinとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1524年4月23日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアマーケト ドレイトンで67歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Deol Burton(이)가 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 크레w커니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Stapleton(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Joyce Griffin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1524년 4월 23일 영국 슈럽실르 마크트 드라이턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에 묻혔다.

mn.Crewkerne, Somersetshire, England: Crewkerne, Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Deol Burton nasceu em 1457, em Crewkerne, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Christian Stapleton, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Joyce Griffin. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1524, em Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Deol Burton родился в 1457 г. в местности крюкирн, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Stapleton, 35. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Joyce Griffin. Он умер 23 апреля 1524 г. в местности маркет дреитон, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Deol Burton nació en 1457, en Crewkerne, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Christian Stapleton, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Joyce Griffin. Murió el 23 de abril de 1524, en Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
